name: Michelle Zatlyn
background: Michelle Zatlyn is one of our co-founders and has served as our President since November 2020, our Chief Operating Officer since April 2012, and as a member of our board of directors since September 2009. Ms. Zatlyn also served as our Secretary from September 2009 to February 2021. Prior to co-founding Cloudflare, Ms. Zatlyn held positions at Google and Toshiba and launched two successful startups. Ms. Zatlyn currently serves on the board of directors of Atlassian Corporation, a software company. Ms. Zatlyn holds a B.S. degree in Chemistry and Business from McGill University and an M.B.A. from Harvard Business School.
